app.title: Rasial Helper
app.subtitle: A safe Alt1 study companion for setup validation, callouts, calibration and bilingual diagnostics.
app.disclaimer: This project is a passive helper only. It does not automate gameplay or send inputs.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: App language and game language are independent so the helper remains usable in mixed-language setups.
settings.forceRecognition: Force selected game language for recognition
settings.forceRecognitionHelp: Use the selected game language even when the auto detector is uncertain.

dashboard.title: Encounter Overview
dashboard.manualModeHelp: Use this when you want callouts and timelines without depending on OCR.

official.title: Alt1 App Mode
official.description: Use the app as an Alt1 web app with explicit permissions and a visible address bar during setup.
official.step1: Open this URL inside an Alt1 window.
official.step2: Enable run as app and grant Overlay permission.
official.step3: Keep Screen pixels disabled until you actually need assisted calibration.
official.step4: Use the setup validator before a run and the coach during the fight.

setup.title: Setup Validator
setup.description: Choose a study preset, paste setup notes if you have them, and confirm what is ready before the encounter.
setup.samplePlaceholder: overload, aura active, familiar summoned, food ready
setup.sampleHint: Detection is assistive only. Manual confirmation always wins.
setup.allRequiredReady: All required setup items are ready.

safeLearning.title: Safe learning
safeLearning.description: Prioritizes survival checks and basic damage support.

balancedFarm.title: Balanced farm
balancedFarm.description: Adds more throughput tools while keeping a full safety baseline.

minimalCheck.title: Minimal check
minimalCheck.description: Fast pre-fight validation for repeated runs.

offensivePotion.title: Offensive potion active
offensivePotion.summary: Main combat potion or equivalent damage buff is prepared.
offensivePotion.why: A missing potion usually lowers damage for the entire fight instead of just one mechanic.
offensivePotion.fix: Refresh the potion before the pull and confirm the timer manually if needed.

combatAura.title: Combat aura enabled
combatAura.summary: Aura or similar long-duration buff is active.
combatAura.why: Auras are easy to forget and have a high opportunity cost if the run starts without them.
combatAura.fix: Check the aura slot before entering and switch presets if you are conserving charges.

familiar.title: Familiar active
familiar.summary: Your familiar or summon support is already active.
familiar.why: This affects consistency across long sessions and is commonly forgotten between deaths or banking.
familiar.fix: Re-summon before the pull and confirm inventory support items are still present.

pocketSlot.title: Pocket slot prepared
pocketSlot.summary: Pocket item, scripture or similar long-duration slot is ready.
pocketSlot.why: Pocket slots are a free source of value when your preset expects them.
pocketSlot.fix: Equip or activate the pocket item and downgrade the preset if you are intentionally skipping it.

protectionPrayer.title: Protection prayer plan
protectionPrayer.summary: Protection prayer, curses or equivalent defense stance is prepared.
protectionPrayer.why: Survival planning is the highest-value part of a study run because it keeps mechanics visible longer.
protectionPrayer.fix: Set the correct prayer before the pull and rehearse the swap timing in coach mode.

emergencyHealing.title: Emergency healing ready
emergencyHealing.summary: Food, brews or other emergency recovery tools are available.
emergencyHealing.why: Learning attempts collapse quickly when recovery tools are missing, even if your rotation is correct.
emergencyHealing.fix: Restock healing and keep one panic response mapped in your plan.

weaponCharges.title: Charges and durability checked
weaponCharges.summary: Weapons, armor and other gear upkeep were reviewed before starting.
weaponCharges.why: This avoids losing runs to preventable upkeep mistakes that have nothing to do with decision-making.
weaponCharges.fix: Repair or recharge before committing to a study block.

conjureOpener.title: Opener resources prepared
conjureOpener.summary: Your opening summon or burst setup is ready.
conjureOpener.why: A clean opener makes it easier to compare one run to another when you are studying improvements.
conjureOpener.fix: Rehearse the opener in coach mode and only mark this as ready when the sequence is intentional.

defensivePlan.title: Defensive plan prepared
defensivePlan.summary: You already know which defensive tools you will spend on the first dangerous moments.
defensivePlan.why: A plan matters more than reflexes during learning, because it reduces panic decisions.
defensivePlan.fix: Write down the first two defensive responses and keep them visible in the overlay.

extraBoost.title: Optional extra boost
extraBoost.summary: Minor optional boosts are active if this preset expects them.
extraBoost.why: These boosts matter less than survival, but they are worth tracking when you compare setups.
extraBoost.fix: Only chase this after required and recommended items are already stable.

coach.title: Fight Coach
coach.description: Step through a study timeline with language-independent mechanics and localized explanations.

calibration.title: Calibration Assistant
calibration.description: Paste or type a sample OCR string to validate aliases, matching tolerance and language assumptions.
calibration.mismatch: Selected language does not match the strongest profile.
calibration.uncertain: The reading is uncertain. Prefer icon, color and position-based checks.

diagnostics.title: History and Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Recent decisions, recognition notes and fallback behavior are listed here.
diagnostics.setupNoMatch: Setup sample did not match known aliases
diagnostics.visualScanEmpty: Visual scan found no strong matches
diagnostics.trackerScanEmpty: Tracker scan found no strong matches
diagnostics.trackerTemplatesFailed: Could not capture tracker icon templates

visual.title: Visual Calibration
visual.description: Define screen regions, test OCR or brightness probes and apply assisted visual evidence to your setup checklist.
visual.samplePlaceholder: Paste OCR text or notes from this region

standard16x9.title: Standard 16:9
standard16x9.description: Balanced default profile for common desktop layouts.

compactUi.title: Compact UI
compactUi.description: Tighter region layout for compact or denser interface arrangements.

buffRibbon.title: Buff ribbon
buffRibbon.description: Top-left status strip for long-duration buffs and support effects.

survivalTray.title: Survival tray
survivalTray.description: Bottom-right defensive area for healing, prayers and panic tools.

familiarPanel.title: Familiar panel
familiarPanel.description: Region for familiar or summon support status.

gearStatus.title: Gear status
gearStatus.description: Small maintenance area for charge or readiness related text.

tracker.title: Necro Gauge and Buff Tracker
tracker.description: Track Rasial-focused stacks, summon timers and upkeep buffs with assisted OCR/sample parsing.
tracker.supportedMode: Supported automatic mode: buff bar small, game scale 100%, UI scale 100%.

rasialStandard.title: Rasial standard
rasialStandard.description: Compact tracker profile for common Rasial helper layouts.

necroGauge.title: Necro gauge
necroGauge.description: Region for necrosis and residual soul stack readouts.

summonBar.title: Summon bar
summonBar.description: Region for conjure or summon timers.

buffBar.title: Buff bar
buffBar.description: Region for timed buffs and upkeep effects.

necrosis.title: Necrosis stacks
necrosis.description: Tracks necrosis stack count when visible or typed in the sample.

residualSouls.title: Residual souls
residualSouls.description: Tracks residual soul stacks for burst planning.

livingDeath.title: Living Death
livingDeath.description: Tracks whether Living Death is active and its remaining time when readable.

bloat.title: Bloat
bloat.description: Tracks Bloat uptime when its timer appears in samples or OCR.

splitSoul.title: Split Soul
splitSoul.description: Tracks Split Soul style upkeep when visible.

overload.title: Overload
overload.description: Tracks whether your main potion upkeep appears active.

help.title: Help
help.mixedLanguage: You can keep the app in one language and the game in another.
help.manualCalibration: If OCR is unreliable, save a manual game-language profile and continue using timers and callouts.
help.newLanguage: Add a new locale JSON file and a new recognition profile to extend the app.

errors.invalidSample: Enter at least one sample text.
